case_title: CLOUD HUNTER LLC. VS. AMY KARLE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT PROOF OF SERVICE - SUBPOENA WITH SC-100 - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 59.00 SERVED DEC-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JAEGER, CURTIS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA (FOR CLOUD HUNTER LLC)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KARLE, AMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JAEGER, CURTIS CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT TO THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT 226 BELLA VISTA WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: TWO COSTUMES (WITH PARTS) REPRESENTING A ROBOT AND A MONSTER AS CREATED BY THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KARLE, AMY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JAEGER, CURTIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (36 PAGE) PAID BY CROSS COMPLAINANT KARLE, AMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAEGER, CURTIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARLE, AMY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,110.00, COMPLAINT IS AMENDED AND CHANGED TO REFLECT THE TRUE PLAINTIFF AS, CURTIS JAEGER, AS AGREED BY THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE - SUBPOENA WITH SC-100 - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 49.00 (SERICE ON CURTIS JAEGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT KARLE, AMY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.
